title: sloanea ferruginea
intro: Sloanea ferruginea, also known as the ironwood tree or ironwood, is a tropical tree species native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Sloanea ferruginea include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin infections, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Sloanea ferruginea can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, with the latter being commonly used in herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments.
